headline: 今日娱乐热点：后室、幸运女神领跑
headlineEn: Today's Entertainment: Backrooms and Lucky Goddess Lead
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周三部新片。热门话题包括后室、幸运女神、奥德赛等，多部大片即将来袭。
summaryEn: No new releases today, 3 this week. Top trends include Backrooms, Lucky Goddess, Odyssey; multiple blockbusters upcoming.

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片仅3部，市场略显冷清
industryHighlights.en: Only 3 new films this week, market quiet

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档，粉丝热议
industryHighlights.en: Spider-Man: New Day confirmed, fans buzzing

industryHighlights.text: 《权力的游戏前传：龙族》持续热度
industryHighlights.en: Game of Thrones prequel: Dragon Clan still trending
